abilities.name: Breath Weapon
abilities.description: The air mephit breathes sand and grit in a that deals 2d6[slashing|options:area-damage] damage to each creature within the area ( save). The air mephit can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Alchemical Chambers
abilities.description: An alchemical golem's body contains six alchemical chambers filled with different substances. When an alchemical golem ability calls upon a randomly determined alchemical effect, roll 1d6 and consult the following: [[/gmr 1d6 #Alchemical Chambers]] Alchemical Effect 1 Acid Damage 2 Cold Damage 3 Electricity Damage 4 Fire Damage 5 Poison Damage 6 Sickness: save or Sickened 1 (Sickened 2 on a critical failure)

abilities.name: Alchemical Rupture
abilities.description: When an alchemical golem takes physical damage from a critical hit or is affected by a spell, one glass chamber within its body shatters, spewing alchemical liquid in a {5-foot emanation}. Roll on the alchemical chambers list to determine which one shatters-on a roll of 1-5, creatures in the area take 10d6 damage of the appropriate type (). On a roll of 6, creatures must instead save against the sickness effect. [[/gmr 1d6 #Alchemical Rupture]] Alchemical Effect 1 10d6[acid|options:area-damage] damage 2 10d6[cold|options:area-damage] damage 3 10d6[electricity|options:area-damage] damage 4 10d6[fire|options:area-damage] damage 5 10d6[poison|options:area-damage] damage 6 Sickness: save or Sickened 1 (Sickened 2 on a critical failure)

abilities.name: Golem Antimagic
abilities.description: Harmed by sonic (5d8[untyped], 2d6[untyped] from areas or persistent damage); healed by acid (area 2d4[healing] HP); slowed by cold

abilities.name: Vulnerable to Shatter
abilities.description: Casting a spell on an alchemical golem affects the golem normally, but also causes an alchemical rupture.

abilities.name: Alchemical Injection
abilities.description: When an alchemical golem hits a creature with a syringe Strike, roll 1d6 on the alchemical chambers list to determine the additional effect of the attack. The syringe deals an additional 2d6 damage of the appropriate type (or exposes the target to the sickness effect, as appropriate). [[/gmr 1d6 #Alchemical Injection]] Alchemical Effect 1 2d6[acid] damage 2 2d6[cold] damage 3 2d6[electricity] damage 4 2d6[fire] damage 5 2d6[poison] damage 6 Sickness: save or Sickened 1 (Sickened 2 on a critical failure)

abilities.name: Generate Bomb
abilities.description: The golem fills an empty vial from one of its alchemical chambers to create a bomb and then makes a bomb Strike. Determine the type of bomb created by rolling 1d6 on the alchemical chambers list. On a roll of 1-4, it creates the corresponding greater alchemical bomb: an Acid Flask from chamber 1, a Frost Vial from chamber 2, Bottled Lightning from chamber 3, or Alchemist's Fire from chamber 4. On a roll of 5, it creates a poisonous bomb that deals 3d10 poison damage and 3 poison splash damage with no other effects. On a roll of 6, it creates a sickness bomb, which exposes the target and all creatures in the splash radius to the sickness effect; creatures hit by only the splash receive a +2 circumstance bonus to their Fortitude saves. [[/gmr 1d6 #Generate Bomb]] Alchemical Effect 1 Acid Flask: 1[acid,3d6[persistent,acid],(3[splash])[acid]] damage 2 Frost Vial: 3d6[cold,(3[splash])[cold]] damage, and –10-foot status penalty to Speeds until end of targets next turn 3 Bottled Lightning: 3d6[electricity,(3[splash])[electricity]] damage, and until start of targets next turn 4 Alchemist's Fire: 3d8[fire,3[persistent,fire],(3[splash])[fire]] damage 5 Poisonous Bomb: 3d10[poison,(3[splash])[poison]] damage 6 Sickness: save or Sickened 1 (Sickened 2 on a critical failure)

abilities.name: Coven
abilities.description: An annis hag adds , , and to her coven's spells.

abilities.name: Bonds of Iron
abilities.description: Once per day, an annis hag can cause a cage built of cold iron fingernails to spring out of nothingness at a range of up to 30 feet, attempting an Athletics check to [[/act grapple]] against the target's Fortitude DC; if the target has a weakness to cold iron, the annis hag gains a +2 circumstance bonus to this check. Unlike a normal Grapple, the annis hag doesn't need to be within reach and can move as she pleases, and a successful attempt lasts until the creature [[/act escape dc=24]]{Escapes}, causing the cage to crumble into rust. Any creature can attempt to destroy the cage by attacking it. It has an AC of 19, Hardness 10, and 40 Hit Points.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.description: The hag can take on the appearance of any Medium female humanoid. This doesn't change her Speed or her attack and damage bonuses with her Strikes but might change the damage type her Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning).

abilities.name: Infernal Wound
abilities.description: A bearded devil's glaive Strike also deals 1d6[bleed] that resists attempts to heal it. The flat check to stop the bleeding starts at . The DC is reduced to only if the bleeding creature or an ally successfully assists with the recovery. The DC to to a creature with an infernal wound is increased by 5. A spellcaster or item attempting to use healing magic on a creature suffering from an infernal wound must succeed at a DC 21 counteract check or the magic fails to heal the creature.

abilities.name: Sound Imitation

abilities.name: Betraying Touch

abilities.name: Exhale Miasma

A creature that fails its save is also pushed 10 feet (20 feet on a critical failure). The marid can't use Rush of Water again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Rush of Water]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Skewer
abilities.description: The marid makes a trident Strike, dealing an extra 2d6[bleed] on a hit (4d6[bleed] on a critical hit).

abilities.name: Attack of Opportunity (Special)
abilities.description: A marilith gains 5 extra reactions per round that they can use only to make Attacks of Opportunity. The demon can't use more than one on the same triggering action, even if a creature leaves several squares in the marilith's reach, and the marilith must use a different weapon for each Attack of Opportunity.

abilities.name: Commander's Aura
abilities.description: 100 feet. Commanded or allied evil creatures in the aura of lower level than the marilith gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, AC, saves, and skill checks.

abilities.name: Failure Vulnerability
abilities.description: A marilith's pride feeds their strength, so the sting of failure wounds them. If the marilith uses a damaging spell or makes a Strike on their turn but doesn't deal any damage that turn, they take (3d6+10)[mental] damage at the end of their turn and their commander's aura deactivates until the end of their next turn.

abilities.name: Bladestorm
abilities.description: The marilith makes up to six longsword Strikes, each against a different target. These attacks count toward the marilith's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks.

abilities.name: Defensive Assault
abilities.description: The marilith makes two Strikes, each with a different weapon, and they use the remaining weapons for protection. The demon gains a circumstance bonus to AC for 1 round equal to the number of weapons not used for attacks. If the marilith later uses any of those weapons to attack (including for an Attack of Opportunity), the bonus to AC decreases by 1 for each weapon used.

abilities.name: Focused Assault
abilities.description: The marilith attacks a single target with all the weapons they wield in their arms, overwhelming the target with multiple attacks and leaving almost nowhere to dodge. The demon makes a longsword Strike. On a successful attack, the marilith deals longsword damage to the target, plus an additional 1d8 slashing damage for every longsword they wield beyond the first (typically 5d8 slashing damage). Even on a failed attack, the marilith deals the damage from one longsword to the target, though they still miss completely on a critical failure. This counts toward the marilith's multiple attack penalty as a number of attacks equal to the number of longswords the pride demon wields.

abilities.name: Greater Constrict
abilities.description: (2d12+13)[bludgeoning],

abilities.name: Infuse Weapons
abilities.description: Any weapon becomes a +2 Greater Striking weapon made of cold iron and silver while a marilith wields it.

The raja rakshasa can't Scoff at the Divine for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Scoff at the Divine]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.description: The raja rakshasa takes on the appearance of any Medium humanoid. This doesn't change the raja rakshasa's Speed or its attack and damage modifiers with its Strikes but might change the damage type its Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning). It typically loses its fangs Strike unless the humanoid form has fangs or a similar unarmed attack.

abilities.name: Disturbing Vision
abilities.description: The raja rakshasa's eyes flash green as it projects a telepathic wave in a . All creatures in the area are assailed by a vision of evil decadence from one of the rakshasa's past lives. Each non-evil creature in the area must succeed at a save or become Sickened 1 (and Stunned 1 on a critical failure). The visions last [[/gmr 1d4 #Disturbing Visions Duration]]{1d4 rounds}, and while they do, the raja rakshasa and all evil creatures in the area gain a +1 status bonus to all checks. The raja rakshasa can use this ability again only once the previous visions end.

Frost (arcane, cold) The dragon breathes a cloud of frost in a that deals 20d6[cold|options:area-damage] damage ( save). Paralyzing Gas (arcane, incapacitation) The dragon breathes a blast of paralyzing gas. Each creature within a must succeed at a save or be for 1 round (or 3 rounds on a critical failure).

abilities.name: Draconic Frenzy
abilities.description: The silver dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

abilities.name: Draconic Momentum
abilities.description: When the silver dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, it recharges its Breath Weapon.

abilities.name: Cloud Walk
abilities.description: The silver dragon can tread on clouds or fog as though on solid ground.

abilities.name: Fog Vision
abilities.description: The silver dragon ignores the condition from fog and clouds.

abilities.name: Frightful Presence
abilities.description: 90 feet.

abilities.name: Wing Deflection
abilities.description: Trigger The silver dragon is targeted with an attack Effect The dragon raises its wing, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the dragon is flying, it descends 10 feet after the attack is complete.

abilities.name: Golem Antimagic
abilities.description: Harmed by cold and water (5d10[untyped], 2d8[untyped] from areas or persistent damage); healed by acid (area 2d8[healing] HP); slowed by earth

abilities.name: Vulnerable to Stone to Flesh
abilities.description: A spell negates the golem's golem antimagic and its resistance to physical damage for 1 round. A spell reverses this effect immediately.

abilities.name: Impose Paralysis
abilities.description: Trigger The stone golem hits a creature. Effect The creature must succeed at a save or become for 1 round.

abilities.name: Inexorable March
abilities.description: On a critical success, the resisting creature takes no damage; otherwise it is damaged as if hit by the golem's fist. The golem Strides up to its Speed, pushing back each creature whose space it moves into and damaging them if they try to stop its movement. A creature can attempt to bar the way by succeeding at a Fortitude save.

abilities.name: Slowing Pulse
abilities.description: Each creature in a {10-foot emanation} must succeed at a save or be Slowed 1 for 1 minute. The golem can't use Slowing Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Slowing Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.description: claw

abilities.name: Vigorous Shake
abilities.description: Trigger The troll king takes Persistent acid or fire damage. Effect The troll king shakes itself to remove persistent acid or fire effects. The troll king immediately attempts a check to end the persistent damage that triggered this reaction. If the troll king succeeds at this check, it can immediately use Primordial Roar as part of this reaction.

abilities.name: Forced Regeneration
abilities.description: Requirements The troll king's regeneration is not currently deactivated. Effect The troll king regains 15[healing] HP.

abilities.name: Primordial Roar
abilities.description: The troll king unleashes a bestial roar. Each non-troll creature within {100 feet} must attempt a save. The creature is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature is Frightened 1 Failure The creature is Frightened 2 Critical Failure The creature is Frightened 3

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.description: claw

abilities.name: Unstoppable Charge
abilities.description: The troll king Strides twice in a straight line. It can make up to two claw Strikes during this movement and one jaws Strike at the end of its movement. It can't Strike the same creature more than once.

abilities.name: Attack of Opportunity (Special)
abilities.description: If the vrock is flying and a creature triggers an attack of opportunity, the vrock can make 2 Strikes with its talons against that creature instead of 1 Strike.

abilities.name: Peace Vulnerability
abilities.description: A vrock's wrath is the heart of their essence, and forcing peace upon them wrenches at their soul. If they fail a save against or a similar effect forcing them to be peaceful, a vrock takes 4d6[mental] damage.

abilities.name: Dance of Ruin
abilities.description: The vrock dances in flight and chants to create a ruinous explosion of electricity. If more vrocks within 30 feet want to join the dance, the vrock can delay the dance to wait for more vrocks; in that case, the effect occurs after the last vrock uses Dance of Ruin or one of the vrocks chooses to complete that round of the dance. Each non-demon creature in a from any of the dancing vrocks takes 2d12[electricity|options:area-damage] damage ( save). For each additional vrock that joins the dance, the damage increases by 1d12 and the save DC increases by 1 (to a maximum of four vrocks dealing 5d12 electricity damage with a DC 31 save). The vrocks can continue dancing by using Dance of Ruin each round, for up to 3 rounds in total. The emanation's size increases by 20 feet each round, and the damage increases by 1d12 per vrock each round. Round Emanation Size 1 2 3

abilities.name: Spore Cloud
abilities.description: The vrock emits a cloud of spores from their body, dealing 2d8[poison|options:area-damage] damage to all adjacent creatures. Each creature damaged this way must succeed at a save or take 2d8[persistent,piercing] damage as the spores penetrate its skin and grow into thick, green vines. The vines cease growing after 10 rounds, and they wither away in [[/gmr 1d4 #Spore Cloud Duration]]{1d4 days} if not shaved off before then. The vines can be destroyed if the creature is affected by a good spell or if is applied to the vines (with an Interact action). Once the vrock uses Spore Cloud, the ability can't be used for [[/gmr 1d6 #Recharge Spore Cloud]]{1d6 rounds}.

abilities.name: Stunning Screech
abilities.description: Frequency once per minute. Effect The vrock emits a shrill screech. Each non-demon creature within a must attempt a save. On a failure, the creature is Stunned 2, and on a critical failure, it's Stunned 3.

abilities.name: Breath Weapon
abilities.description: The water mephit breathes acid in a that deals 2d6[acid|options:area-damage] damage to each creature within the area ( save). The water mephit can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Drench
abilities.description: The water mephit puts out all fires in a . The mephit extinguishes all non-magical fires automatically and attempts to counteract magical fires ([[/r 1d20+7 #Drench]]{+7} counteract modifier).

abilities.name: Snow Vision
abilities.description: Snow doesn't impair a white dragon's vision; it ignores Concealment from snowfall.

abilities.description: 5 feet. 2d6[cold|options:area-damage] damage ( save)

abilities.description: Trigger An adjacent creature deals piercing or slashing damage to the dragon. Effect The dragon's blood sprays on the creature, dealing 2d6[cold] damage. A creature that takes cold damage in this way is Slowed 1 for 1 round.

abilities.description: 90 feet.

abilities.name: Ground Slam
abilities.description: The dragon slams into the ground. It can do this if it's on the ground or Flying within 10 feet of the ground. Each creature on the ground within {10 feet} must succeed at a save or fall and take 3d6[bludgeoning|options:area-damage] damage. The dragon can then Step.

abilities.name: Ice Climb
abilities.description: A white dragon can climb on ice as though it had the listed climb Speed. It ignores difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain from ice and snow and doesn't risk falling when crossing ice.

abilities.name: Shape Ice
abilities.description: The dragon reshapes a cube of ice or snow it touches, up to 10 feet across. Any creature standing atop the ice must succeed at a save or check. On a failure, the creature falls atop the ice; on a critical failure, it falls off the ice entirely and is also prone.
